title: A Bloodline Marked for Death
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Giants, Robin, Unknown person #11, Rocks D. Xebec, Unknown person #12 as The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.
scene: The conflict widens into persecution, bloodline hatred, and the violent forces that shaped Elbaf and the wider world’s history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They see you giants as nothin' but a military asset!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You'll all be enslaved as soldiers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A long time ago, this country was attacked by giants.

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: What Happened to your Warrior's Pride?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Quit talking like you know everything!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Our Warriors created a history of violence!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Elbaf is shackled by it! Held back from achieving true peace!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that kind of fear doesn't fade so easily...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen, rocks!! No matter how foolish the celestial dragons may be...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They still have the influence in the world to bring Elbaf into the loop!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ya won't be gettin' another invite from me again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't throw away my people's lives by following a villain like you into a losing battle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There was no true conclusion, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This unorthodox friendship had come to an end.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two would not meet again for some time...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not until the day of a certain incident.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: And they've got your red hair!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope that they grow up to be as bright as you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: don't worry, we'll pitch in since their DADDY is away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Have you settled on names for them?

summary: This part advances the A Hunted Bloodline through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
